case_title: JAMES CONNELLY VS. TOMMY DEMBOW et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DEMBOW, TOMMY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DEMBOW, TOMMY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONNELLY, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMBOW, TOMMY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 524 GUERRERO STREET, APARTMENT #6, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DEMBOW, TOMMY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNELLY, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT DEMBOW, TOMMY DOES 1 TO 5,INCLUSVIE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNELLY, JAMES SERVED FEB-20-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEMBOW, TOMMY
DECLARATION TODD ROTHBARD FILED RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNELLY, JAMES
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNELLY, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT DEMBOW, TOMMY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNELLY, JAMES
